home.heroSubtitle: Urethane Molding · Synthetic Resin Processing · CNC Machining · Mold Fabrication
home.ctaSubtitle: Backed by 25 years of precision machining experience
home.ctaPersuasion: Send us your drawings and we'll review them and get back to you
home.portfolioSubtitle: Supplying parts to major domestic and international corporations
home.portfolio1: Automaker transmission line blue MC plate machining
home.whySubtitle: 25 years supplying precision parts to Korea's leading manufacturers.
home.why1Desc: Our in-house urethane mold base technology strengthens precision and durability of urethane molds. Single in-house plant covers prototype to mass production.
home.why2Desc: From urethane molding to synthetic resin, CNC machining, mold fabrication, and EV parts — all processed in a single facility. No outsourcing, faster delivery.
home.why3Desc: Continuously supplying parts to leading domestic and international companies in automotive, battery, and materials sectors for over 25 years. See the clients page for collaboration details.
home.why4Desc: Equipped with dedicated processing lines for battery pack components, motor parts, and other EV-specific parts. Ready for the green mobility era.

about.pageDescription: Learn about NAJIN TECHNOLOGY's history, vision, and certifications.

about.missionContent: To enhance our customers' competitiveness through top-quality products and services, while providing growth opportunities for our employees.

business.pageDescription: Explore NAJIN TECHNOLOGY's core business areas.

urethane.title: Urethane Molding
urethane.desc: We specialize in urethane molding using our patented mold base technology. We precision-mold a wide range of urethane products including automotive parts, industrial rollers, and shock absorbers to meet customer specifications.
urethane.features: Patented Mold Base · Automotive Parts · Industrial Rollers · Shock Absorbers · Custom Molding

resin.title: Synthetic Resin Processing
resin.desc: We precisely process various engineering plastics including PC, PE, Acetal (POM), Nylon, and PTFE. Custom part manufacturing is available based on customer drawings.
resin.features: PC · PE · Acetal (POM) · Nylon · PTFE · Custom Processing

cnc.title: CNC/MCT Precision Machining
cnc.desc: Using state-of-the-art CNC/MCT equipment, we perform high-precision machining on various materials including aluminum, brass, stainless steel, and synthetic resins.
cnc.features: Aluminum · Brass · Stainless Steel · Synthetic Resin · High Precision · Mass Production

mold.title: Mold Fabrication
mold.desc: We provide one-stop service from precision mold design to fabrication. We have extensive experience in high-difficulty mold manufacturing for EV parts and battery packs.
mold.features: Mold Design · Mold Fabrication · EV Parts Molds · Battery Pack Molds · One-Stop Service

ev.title: EV Parts Processing
ev.desc: Keeping pace with the EV era, we process battery pack components, motor-related parts, and other EV-specific parts. We contribute to the eco-friendly future industry.
ev.features: Battery Pack Parts · Motor Parts · EV Specialized · Eco-friendly Industry

portfolio.pageDescription: NAJIN TECHNOLOGY's major clients and delivery track record.
portfolio.clientsDesc: NAJIN TECHNOLOGY supplies reliable parts to major domestic and international companies.
portfolio.caseStudiesDesc: Representative projects completed by NAJIN TECHNOLOGY.
portfolio.case1Title: Automaker Press Shop Urethane Mold Support
portfolio.case1Desc: Automotive parts supplied to major automaker press shops and powertrain assembly lines using our in-house urethane mold base technology.
portfolio.case2Desc: MC (Monomer Cast Nylon) blocks for battery plants. CNC/MCT equipment used for precision machining across various synthetic resin materials.
portfolio.case3Desc: Urethane sheets for automated warehouses delivered to overseas automaker and tier-1 parts plants. Experienced in cross-border supply.
portfolio.ctaDesc: Send us your drawings and we'll review them and get back to you.

paused.title: Quote requests are paused
paused.defaultMessage: We are temporarily not accepting new quote requests due to high demand. Please leave your contact below and our team will reach out as soon as we can take it on.
paused.contactPrompt: Just your company name and phone number. We will contact you first when we reopen.

quote.pageDescription: Request a quote from NAJIN TECHNOLOGY.
quote.descriptionPlaceholder: Please describe your processing requirements, drawing details, etc.
quote.attachmentHelp: PDF, DWG, DXF, STEP, IGS, JPG, PNG (max 10MB)
quote.optionalFieldsHint: You can request a quote with just the required fields
quote.successMessage: Our team will review your request and contact you.
quote.responsePromise: We'll review your drawings and get back to you
quote.nextSteps: Our team will review your request and send a detailed quotation.
quote.faq1Q: Is there a minimum order quantity?
quote.faq1A: No minimum order. We handle everything from single prototypes to mass production.
quote.faq2A: Typically 7-14 days after quote confirmation, depending on product specifications.
quote.faq3Q: Can I get a quote without drawings?
quote.faq3A: Yes, rough specs and quantity are enough for a ballpark estimate. Detailed drawings are needed for precise quotes.

faq.pageDescription: Frequently asked questions about NAJIN TECHNOLOGY services.
faq.question1: What services does NAJIN TECHNOLOGY provide?
faq.answer1: NAJIN TECHNOLOGY provides five core services: Urethane Molding, Synthetic Resin Processing, CNC/MCT Precision Machining, Mold Fabrication, and EV Parts Processing. With over 25 years of experience, all processes are handled in a single facility for one-stop service.
faq.answer2: We process urethane, PC, PE, Acetal (POM), Nylon, PTFE and other synthetic resins, as well as metals including aluminum, brass, and stainless steel. Please contact us about special material processing.
faq.answer3: Yes, NAJIN TECHNOLOGY holds ISO 9001 Quality Management System certification and CLEAN Workplace certification. We also hold a patent for our urethane mold base technology.
faq.question4: What is the typical lead time?
faq.answer4: Lead times vary by product type and quantity, but generally range from 2-4 weeks. Simple machined parts can be delivered within 1 week. For complex precision parts or large orders, please consult with us in advance.
faq.question5: Can you handle small batch orders?
faq.answer5: Yes, we handle everything from prototype production to mass production. We also offer prototyping services for new product development stages.
faq.question6: Do you work with international clients?
faq.answer6: Yes, we work with international clients in China and Southeast Asia. We provide technical communication support in English and Chinese, including overseas shipping.
faq.question7: What is the patented urethane mold base technology?
faq.answer7: This is NAJIN TECHNOLOGY's in-house urethane mold base technology that strengthens precision and durability in urethane mold fabrication. The strength is end-to-end handling from prototype to mass production within our own plant.
faq.question8: How do I request a quote?
faq.answer8: Simply fill out the form on our Quote Request page. Attach your drawings (DWG, STEP, PDF, etc.) and our team will review them and respond with a detailed quote. You can also call us at +82-55-367-2596.
